mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('journal_entry_seq')
INSERT INTO journal_entry (id, situation_text, created_at, user_id, relationship_tag) VALUES (#{id}, #{situationText}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{userId}, #{relationshipTag, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT id, situation_text, created_at, user_id, relationship_tag FROM journal_entry WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT relationship_tag FROM journal_entry WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND relationship_tag IS NOT NULL ORDER BY relationship_tag
